blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 52°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
